daily.today_energy: Mercury's vibes are giving you permission to be unapologetically yourself. There's a magnetic pull toward authenticity today—lean into it. Your energy is contagious, so share it generously.
daily.love: If you're coupled up, vulnerability is your superpower rn. Single? Someone's been noticing your glow from afar. Either way, let your guard down just a little—connection thrives there.
daily.career: Your ideas are hitting different today. Trust your instincts on that project or conversation you've been sitting on. The universe is amplifying your voice—make it count.
daily.health: Your body's asking for movement that feels good, not punishing. Whether it's dancing, walking, or stretching, listen to what brings you joy. Energy flows where intention goes.

weekly.overview: Mercury's doing its thing this week, bringing fresh perspectives to your usual chaos. You're entering a phase where curiosity pays off—lean into those random conversations and unexpected invitations. Your vibe is magnetic rn.
weekly.love: Whether you're coupled up or solo, vulnerability is your superpower right now. Someone's noticing your authenticity, and if you're already with someone, deeper conversations are calling. Don't overthink the feelings bubbling up.
weekly.career: Your ideas are hitting different this week. That project you've been hesitant about? Time to pitch it. Collaborative energy is strong, so bring others into your vision. Recognition might come from unexpected corners.
weekly.health: Your body's asking for more movement and less scrolling. Nothing extreme—just enough to shake off stagnant energy. Sleep quality matters more than quantity rn, so prioritize rest over grinding. Your nervous system will thank you.
